governance_claim_create.postgresqlSql: INSERT INTO governance.claims (claim_name, context_session_id, session_governance_id, scope_declaration_id, intent_id, actor_id, claim_status, declared_scope_files_json, allowed_mutation_surfaces_json, metadata_json) VALUES (%s, %s::uuid, %s::uuid, %s::uuid, %s, %s, %s, %s::jsonb, %s::jsonb, %s::jsonb) RETURNING claim_id::text AS claim_id, claim_name, context_session_id::text AS context_session_id, session_governance_id::text AS session_governance_id, scope_declaration_id::text AS scope_declaration_id, intent_id, actor_id, claim_status, declared_scope_files_json::text AS declared_scope_files_json, allowed_mutation_surfaces_json::text AS allowed_mutation_surfaces_json, metadata_json::text AS metadata_json, created_at, updated_at
governance_claim_create.sqlServerSql: INSERT INTO governance.claims (claim_name, context_session_id, session_governance_id, scope_declaration_id, intent_id, actor_id, claim_status, declared_scope_files_json, allowed_mutation_surfaces_json, metadata_json) OUTPUT INSERTED.claim_id, INSERTED.claim_name, INSERTED.context_session_id, INSERTED.session_governance_id, INSERTED.scope_declaration_id, INSERTED.intent_id, INSERTED.actor_id, INSERTED.claim_status, INSERTED.declared_scope_files_json, INSERTED.allowed_mutation_surfaces_json, INSERTED.metadata_json, INSERTED.created_at, INSERTED.updated_at VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

governance_claim_get.postgresqlSql: SELECT claim_id::text AS claim_id, claim_name, context_session_id::text AS context_session_id, session_governance_id::text AS session_governance_id, scope_declaration_id::text AS scope_declaration_id, intent_id, actor_id, claim_status, declared_scope_files_json::text AS declared_scope_files_json, allowed_mutation_surfaces_json::text AS allowed_mutation_surfaces_json, metadata_json::text AS metadata_json, created_at, updated_at FROM governance.claims WHERE claim_id = %s::uuid
governance_claim_get.sqlServerSql: SELECT claim_id, claim_name, context_session_id, session_governance_id, scope_declaration_id, intent_id, actor_id, claim_status, declared_scope_files_json, allowed_mutation_surfaces_json, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at FROM governance.claims WHERE claim_id = ?

governance_claim_update_metadata.postgresqlSql: UPDATE governance.claims SET metadata_json = %s::jsonb, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE claim_id = %s::uuid RETURNING claim_id::text AS claim_id, claim_name, context_session_id::text AS context_session_id, session_governance_id::text AS session_governance_id, scope_declaration_id::text AS scope_declaration_id, intent_id, actor_id, claim_status, declared_scope_files_json::text AS declared_scope_files_json, allowed_mutation_surfaces_json::text AS allowed_mutation_surfaces_json, metadata_json::text AS metadata_json, created_at, updated_at
governance_claim_update_metadata.sqlServerSql: UPDATE governance.claims SET metadata_json = ?, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE claim_id = ?

governance_claim_get_active_for_context_.postgresqlSql: SELECT claim_id::text AS claim_id, claim_name, context_session_id::text AS context_session_id, session_governance_id::text AS session_governance_id, scope_declaration_id::text AS scope_declaration_id, intent_id, actor_id, claim_status, declared_scope_files_json::text AS declared_scope_files_json, allowed_mutation_surfaces_json::text AS allowed_mutation_surfaces_json, metadata_json::text AS metadata_json, created_at, updated_at FROM governance.claims WHERE context_session_id = %s::uuid AND claim_status IN ('active', 'blocked') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
governance_claim_get_active_for_context_.sqlServerSql: SELECT TOP (1) claim_id, claim_name, context_session_id, session_governance_id, scope_declaration_id, intent_id, actor_id, claim_status, declared_scope_files_json, allowed_mutation_surfaces_json, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at FROM governance.claims WHERE context_session_id = ? AND claim_status IN ('active', 'blocked') ORDER BY created_at DESC

governance_claim_get_scope_declaration.postgresqlSql: SELECT scope_declaration_id::text AS scope_declaration_id, session_governance_id::text AS session_governance_id, allowed_mutation_surfaces_json::text AS allowed_mutation_surfaces_json FROM governance.session_scope_declarations WHERE scope_declaration_id = %s::uuid
governance_claim_get_scope_declaration.sqlServerSql: SELECT scope_declaration_id, session_governance_id, allowed_mutation_surfaces_json FROM governance.session_scope_declarations WHERE scope_declaration_id = ?

governance_claim_update_status.postgresqlSql: UPDATE governance.claims SET claim_status = %s, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE claim_id = %s::uuid RETURNING claim_id::text AS claim_id, claim_name, context_session_id::text AS context_session_id, session_governance_id::text AS session_governance_id, scope_declaration_id::text AS scope_declaration_id, intent_id, actor_id, claim_status, declared_scope_files_json::text AS declared_scope_files_json, allowed_mutation_surfaces_json::text AS allowed_mutation_surfaces_json, metadata_json::text AS metadata_json, created_at, updated_at
governance_claim_update_status.sqlServerSql: UPDATE governance.claims SET claim_status = ?, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE claim_id = ?

governance_claim_get_signoff.postgresqlSql: SELECT claim_signoff_id::text AS claim_signoff_id, claim_id::text AS claim_id, context_session_id::text AS context_session_id, intent_id, acknowledged_reminders_json::text AS acknowledged_reminders_json, intent_confirmation, actor_signature, signoff_status, created_at, updated_at FROM governance.claim_signoffs WHERE claim_id = %s::uuid
governance_claim_get_signoff.sqlServerSql: SELECT claim_signoff_id, claim_id, context_session_id, intent_id, acknowledged_reminders_json, intent_confirmation, actor_signature, signoff_status, created_at, updated_at FROM governance.claim_signoffs WHERE claim_id = ?

governance_claim_record_signoff.postgresqlSql: INSERT INTO governance.claim_signoffs (claim_id, context_session_id, intent_id, acknowledged_reminders_json, intent_confirmation, actor_signature, signoff_status) VALUES (%s::uuid, %s::uuid, %s, %s::jsonb, %s, %s, %s) ON CONFLICT (claim_id) DO UPDATE SET context_session_id = EXCLUDED.context_session_id, intent_id = EXCLUDED.intent_id, acknowledged_reminders_json = EXCLUDED.acknowledged_reminders_json, intent_confirmation = EXCLUDED.intent_confirmation, actor_signature = EXCLUDED.actor_signature, signoff_status = EXCLUDED.signoff_status, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP RETURNING claim_signoff_id::text AS claim_signoff_id, claim_id::text AS claim_id, context_session_id::text AS context_session_id, intent_id, acknowledged_reminders_json::text AS acknowledged_reminders_json, intent_confirmation, actor_signature, signoff_status, created_at, updated_at
governance_claim_record_signoff.sqlServerSql: MERGE governance.claim_signoffs AS target USING (SELECT ? AS claim_id, ? AS context_session_id, ? AS intent_id, ? AS acknowledged_reminders_json, ? AS intent_confirmation, ? AS actor_signature, ? AS signoff_status) AS src ON target.claim_id = src.claim_id WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET context_session_id = src.context_session_id, intent_id = src.intent_id, acknowledged_reminders_json = src.acknowledged_reminders_json, intent_confirmation = src.intent_confirmation, actor_signature = src.actor_signature, signoff_status = src.signoff_status WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (claim_id, context_session_id, intent_id, acknowledged_reminders_json, intent_confirmation, actor_signature, signoff_status) VALUES (src.claim_id, src.context_session_id, src.intent_id, src.acknowledged_reminders_json, src.intent_confirmation, src.actor_signature, src.signoff_status) OUTPUT INSERTED.claim_signoff_id, INSERTED.claim_id, INSERTED.context_session_id, INSERTED.intent_id, INSERTED.acknowledged_reminders_json, INSERTED.intent_confirmation, INSERTED.actor_signature, INSERTED.signoff_status, INSERTED.created_at, INSERTED.updated_at;
